message:
chore: rename residual bootstrap type names and provenance strings

Rename BootstrapManifest → RootManifest, BootstrapManifestEntry →
RootManifestEntry, and provenance "bootstrap" → "root". Fix stale
comment and qm-fabricator description.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 ---
 name: qm-fabricator
-description: "Build new specialist agent YAML definitions on the fly"
+description: "Build new specialist agent definitions on the fly"
 model: best
 tools:
   - read_file
